docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAR-24-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-10-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ANSWER TO REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SC-105) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, SUSAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-24-2017 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (FORM SC-105A) THE REQUEST IS DENIED. COPIES MAILED OUT TO PARTIES FILED BY DEFENDANT COLIGNON, ROMAIN AS TO PLAINTIFF TAN, SUSAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAN, SUSAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLIGNON, ROMAIN $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,205.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT COLIGNON, ROMAIN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED-VACANT-UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COLIGNON, ROMAIN
REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT COLIGNON, ROMAIN AS TO PLAINTIFF TAN, SUSAN
DECLARATION OF SUSAN TAN RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, SUSAN
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OF DEFENDANT BY DECL. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, SUSAN
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 3/24/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-UNCLAIMED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY TAN, SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT COLIGNON, ROMAIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF TAN, SUSAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $140.00 SERVED FEB-21-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COLIGNON, ROMAIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-24-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-24-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTFF SUSAN TAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROMAIN COLIGNON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
